title: Bitcoin retail sentiment still matters, says Swan Bitcoin CEO
summary: Swan Bitcoin CEO Cory Klippsten said it is important to pay attention to retail sentiment around Bitcoin, as ownership is still far from concentrated and “it’s not like Blackrock owns the Bitcoin.”

title: Bitcoin dip buyers place $500M in bids as $70K retest looms
summary: Over $500 million in Bitcoin bids now sit near $70,000, while options traders and futures positions converge around the same level.

title: MiniMax Plans China IPO as It Eyes Local Rivals Like DeepSeek
summary: China’s MiniMax Group Inc. has begun preparations for a domestic initial public offering, according to a regulatory filing, as the fast‑growing artificial intelligence startup challenges local rivals including DeepSeek.

title: Philippine Central Bank Says Inflation May Surge Further in May
summary: The Philippine central bank said the pace of inflation is likely to increase this month, mainly because of food-price increases and the peso’s weakness.

title: 'He’s Full of Shit': JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon Takes Aim at Coinbase CEO Over Clarity Act
summary: Dimon vowed to fight the passage of the crypto market structure bill until the bitter end.

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. has "outright grabbed" roughly $1 billion worth of cryptocurrencies from Iran via seizures.

title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iran, Bessent says
summary: Earlier this year, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. had seized "nearly $500 million" in Iranian crypto assets.

title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon blasts Coinbase’s Brian Armstrong, plans to fight Clarity Act
summary: Dimon said Coinbase's Armstrong is spending hundreds of millions of dollars trying to get Clarity Act passed.

title: Trump will remain ‘patient’ in pursuit of a deal with Iran, says Hegseth
summary: US president wants to make a ‘great’ deal as Washington and Tehran seek to end the conflict

title: Hegseth says US-China ties are ‘better than in years’
summary: Pentagon chief still presses allies to boost defence spending to counter ‘military build-up’ by Beijing
